diff_checked.reason: The agent explicitly ran `git diff --stat && git diff --cached --stat && git status --short` to check for any changes in the repository.

empty_diff_detected.reason: The agent correctly concluded 'Изменений нет — рабочее дерево чистое' (No changes - working tree is clean). This matches the final git status evidence showing 'nothing to commit, working tree clean' …

early_stop.reason: The agent stopped immediately after detecting no changes, stating 'No changes to review' and 'Рецензировать нечего' (Nothing to review), without proceeding to execute any full review process.

no_commit.reason: The git log shows only the initial 'init' commit and final git status shows 'nothing to commit, working tree clean'. The agent made no commits.
